title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 20 lines).
summary_text: - High: [auto-push-after-commit.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh#L35) auto-pushes every successful `git commit` if an upstream exists. That is an external publication side effect without confirmation, and it can leak WIP or secrets from local-only commits. - High: [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/canon/SKILL.md#L75) [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/canon/SKILL.md#L95) [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/canon/SKILL.md#L133) [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/canon/SKILL.md#L146) Step 1 renamed pane vars to `CODER/CICD/REVIEW`, but later steps still instruct users to use `RIGHT/MID/BOT`. Following the doc will read/send to nonexistent surfaces and break the workflow. - Medium: [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/canon/SKILL.md#L125) [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/canon/SKILL.md#L130) [SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/canon/SKILL.md#L141) the prose still describes a `Tester-Codex`/`mini` stage, but Step 1 now launches `CI/CD+Debug`. The operational contract is inconsistent, so status updates and delegation targets are wrong even if the pane creation succeeds. - Medium: [canon-build-cicd.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-cicd.sh#L79) [canon-build-cicd.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-cicd.sh#L90) [canon-build-cicd.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-cicd.sh#L116) hard-requires `gtimeout` with no fallback to `timeout`/plain execution. On a default macOS setup this command is absent, so the new CI/CD pane will fail at runtime. - Medium: [canon-build-debug.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-debug.sh#L11) [canon-build-debug.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-debug.sh#L58) [canon-build-debug.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-build-debug.sh#L72) `LAST_LOG_SIZE` is tracked globally, not per file. Once one log advances, offsets for the next file become invalid, so error monitoring will miss entries or tail from the wrong byte position. - Medium: [eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L341) [eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L350) the refactor removed the previous CJK-line skip inside bash blocks. SKILL docs in this repo frequently contain Japanese comments/prose in fenced bash, so this will increase false `PHANTOM_CMD` penalties and make scoring less reliable.
